positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for peter_tidy_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~spills_lots_of_food(peter)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~cleanly(peter)).

cnf(u15,negated_conjecture,
    ~notably_tidy(peter)).

cnf(u9,axiom,
    ~notably_tidy(X0) | ~spills_lots_of_food(X0)).

cnf(u10,axiom,
    ~cleanly(X0) | notably_tidy(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
